DTEval 0.0.10
  • Reference
  • Changelog

    dt.gla

    dt.gla.Rd

    Nitrogen dioxide (NO2) diffusion tube data for monitoring locations in London, 2021 to 2023.

    dt.gla

    Format

    A (68640x18) 'data.frame' object

    X (m)

    Site Easting

    Y (m)

    Site Northing

    Site ID

    Site Identifier

    Site Name

    Site Name

    Site Type

    Site Classification

    Valid data capture for monitoring period %

    The data capture as a percentage for monitoring period

    Valid data capture %

    Valid data capture for monitoring period

    Annual mean – raw data

    Annual mean, as reported

    Annual mean – annualised and bias adjusted

    Annual mean, after bias correction

    local_authority

    The local authority

    year

    Year tube was deployed/measurement taken

    month

    Month tube was deployed/measurement taken

    measurement

    The tube measurement reported for that year and month, (in ug/m3; tbc'd)

    .longitude

    DTEval Tag

    .latitude

    DTEval Tag

    .start_date

    DTEval Tag

    .end_date

    DTEval Tag

    .site_id

    DTEval Tag

    Source

    Greater London Authority / London Data Store

    https://data.london.gov.uk/publisher/gla-and-tfl-air-quality (downloaded 2024-12-02)

    Details

    NO2 DT measurement and meta data sets were downloaded from the London Data Store (see Source), and processed as follows:

    Monthly measurements were wide-to-long to make month and measurement columns.

    WGS84 Latitude and Longitude coordinate tags were calculated for the data using grey.area::geoConvertBNG2LatLon and assuming X (m) and Y (m) are British National Grid (BNG) Easting and Northing coordinates, respectively.

    Note

    This data set is from a public source but still being QA'ed/cleared. So, contents may change. So, handle with care, and report any concerns.

    Contents

    Developed by Karl Ropkins.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.1.3.
